text:
Mood Interview - Movement Different Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident's movement and speech is different (slow or fidgety or restless). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
9=No response (leave column 2 blank)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
133 D0200H2_MVMT_DFRNT_FREQ_CD D0200H2_MVMT_DFRNT_FREQ_CD D0200H2 Resident Mood Interview - Movement Different Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column
